text:
## Branch Compliance  
### Regulatory Compliance  
**Key Compliance Areas:**
- KYC/CDD (see [[business_ontology]], KYC-SOP-001)
- AML screening (AML-POL-002)
- Complaint handling (COM-POL-006)
- Customer privacy (GDPR, PRI-POL-004)
- Data handling (DPA)  
**Compliance Certification:** All branch managers certified annually
**Audit Schedule:** Annual audit of branch controls  
**See:** Compliance Bulletins (COMP-BULL-2026)
name: Chunk 26/34

raw_entities.name: Branch
raw_entities.description: The physical or operational location within FirstUK Bank responsible for executing branch-level compliance activities, maintaining regulatory certifications, and undergoing annual control audits.

raw_entities.name: Branch Manager
raw_entities.description: The leadership role accountable for ensuring branch-level regulatory compliance, including maintaining annual certification and overseeing the execution of branch control audits.

raw_entities.name: KYC/CDD Process
raw_entities.description: A core regulatory compliance concept encompassing Know Your Customer and Customer Due Diligence procedures, governed by the bank's business ontology and SOP-001.

raw_entities.name: AML Screening
raw_entities.description: A mandatory compliance concept involving the screening of customers and transactions to prevent money laundering, governed by internal policy AML-POL-002.

raw_entities.name: Complaint Handling
raw_entities.description: The structured operational concept for receiving, processing, and resolving customer complaints in accordance with internal policy COM-POL-006.

raw_entities.name: Customer Privacy
raw_entities.description: A regulatory and operational concept focused on protecting customer personal information, aligned with GDPR standards and internal policy PRI-POL-004.

raw_entities.name: Data Handling
raw_entities.description: The operational concept governing the secure processing, storage, and management of bank data in strict compliance with the Data Protection Act (DPA).

raw_entities.name: Annual Compliance Certification
raw_entities.description: A mandatory operational frequency target requiring all branch managers to complete regulatory compliance certification on an annual basis.

raw_entities.name: Annual Branch Audit
raw_entities.description: A scheduled operational frequency target dictating that branch-level controls and compliance measures undergo a comprehensive audit every year.

raw_entities.name: KYC/CDD Compliance Requirement
raw_entities.description: A binding operational rule mandating adherence to the KYC/CDD standard operating procedure (KYC-SOP-001) as a fundamental branch compliance area.

raw_entities.name: AML Screening Policy Constraint
raw_entities.description: A mandatory policy constraint requiring all branch operations to execute anti-money laundering screening procedures in accordance with AML-POL-002.

raw_entities.name: Complaint Handling Policy
raw_entities.description: An operational governance rule dictating the mandatory process for managing customer complaints per internal policy COM-POL-006.

raw_entities.name: Customer Privacy Policy
raw_entities.description: A governance rule enforcing data privacy standards aligned with GDPR and internal policy PRI-POL-004 for all customer-facing operations.

raw_entities.name: Data Protection Compliance Rule
raw_entities.description: A mandatory rule requiring strict adherence to the Data Protection Act (DPA) for all data processing and handling activities within the branch.

raw_entities.name: Branch Control Audit Schedule
raw_entities.description: A governance rule mandating an annual audit to verify the effectiveness, accuracy, and compliance of branch-level operational controls.

key_responsibilities: Ensure regulatory compliance across branch operations

properties.regulatory_significance: Core regulatory compliance area for branch operations
Key regulatory compliance area for branch operations
Key regulatory compliance area for branch operations

business_rules: Governed by GDPR and policy PRI-POL-004
properties.regulatory_significance: Key regulatory compliance area for branch operations
Key regulatory compliance area for branch operations

properties.what_it_measures: Certification status of branch management against regulatory standards
Effectiveness and compliance of branch controls

properties.rule_statement: Branch must adhere to KYC/CDD standards as defined in the business ontology
Branch must conduct AML screening per established policy
Branch must manage complaints according to specified policy
Branch must protect customer privacy in line with GDPR and internal policy
Branch must handle data in compliance with Data Protection Act
Branch controls must undergo an annual audit

relationships.description: The Branch is responsible for executing and overseeing the KYC/CDD process as a key compliance area.
The Branch manages the AML screening process to ensure regulatory adherence.
The Branch oversees the complaint handling process as a core operational compliance area.
The Branch manages customer privacy practices in alignment with GDPR requirements.
The Branch oversees data handling procedures to ensure compliance with the DPA.
The KYC/CDD Process is governed by the specific compliance requirement to ensure regulatory standards are met.
AML Screening activities are constrained and directed by the AML screening policy.
The Complaint Handling process is governed by the established policy to ensure consistent resolution standards.
Customer Privacy practices are governed by the internal privacy policy aligned with GDPR.
Data Handling procedures are governed by the Data Protection Compliance Rule.
The Branch enforces the KYC/CDD compliance requirement across all customer onboarding and servicing interactions.
The Branch enforces the AML screening policy constraint to mitigate financial crime risks.
The Branch enforces the complaint handling policy to maintain service quality and regulatory standards.
The Branch enforces the customer privacy policy in line with GDPR and internal standards.
The Branch enforces data protection compliance rules across all operational data flows.
The Branch Manager is personally accountable for achieving and maintaining annual compliance certification.
The Branch's operational and compliance controls are measured and validated through the annual audit process.
relationships.context: Audit Schedule: Annual audit of branch controls

relationships.description: The Branch is subject to the predefined audit schedule governing branch control reviews.
